title: ModifierSheet
description: Live-play, derived, and conditional character state. The 'scratch paper' tracked during a session. Deriver has 3 modes: (a) fill from scratch, (b) fill gaps + protect non-overwritable fields, (c) skip derivation + validate only. The validator ALWAYS runs regardless of mode. All fields below marked 'non-overwritable' are NEVER touched by the deriver when pre-filled. Content-neutral: catalog-driven.
$comment: NON-OVERWRITABLE FIELDS (deriver never touches when pre-filled in mode b): character_states[], hit_points.current, hit_points.temp, death_saves.*, hit_dice.*.remaining, spell_slots.*.remaining, pact_slots.*.remaining, resource_state.*.remaining, features[].uses.remaining, feats[].uses.remaining, item_states[].attuned, item_states[].consumed, item_states[].charges.remaining, item_states[].cumulative_seconds_used, prepared_spells, treasure.*, xp. All other fields are overwritten with computed values.

derived_from_core.description: Hash of the CORE sheet this modifier was derived from. Null when hand-built.

derived_from_grimoire.description: Hash of the GRIMOIRE sheet this modifier was derived from. Null when hand-built.

xp.description: Experience points. NON-OVERWRITABLE. Set at generation time only; the deriver never touches a pre-filled value.

max_reduction.description: Temporary reduction to max HP (effective max = CORE.hit_points.max + max_boost - max_reduction). Derivable from active states (curse, drain).

max_boost.description: Temporary increase to max HP (e.g. Aid spell). Derivable from active states.

hit_dice.description: Remaining hit dice by die size. Keys like 'd8', 'd10'. NON-OVERWRITABLE (per die). Max values live in CORE.

spell_slots.description: Remaining leveled spell slots by level. NON-OVERWRITABLE. Max values live in GRIMOIRE.

pact_slots.description: Remaining Pact Magic slots by level. NON-OVERWRITABLE. Max values live in GRIMOIRE.

resource_state.description: Per-resource expendable counters (class resources, feature uses, feat uses, slotless-per-rest spell uses). Key identifies the resource. max and recharge are derivable (from CORE resource_budgets + DB). remaining is NON-OVERWRITABLE.

max.description: Max uses. null = unlimited. Derivable from CORE resource_budgets.

remaining.description: Remaining uses. NON-OVERWRITABLE. null when max is null (unlimited).

recharge.description: Recharge trigger(s). Derivable from CORE resource_budgets + DB.

recharge_amount.description: How much is regained on recharge. Derivable from CORE resource_budgets + DB.

abilities.description: Derived ability modifiers and temporary reductions. Final scores and base values live in CORE.

modifier.description: Derived: floor((effective_score - 10) / 2) where effective_score = CORE.final - reduction.

reduction.description: Temporary reduction to the score. Effective score = CORE.final - reduction.

saving_throws.description: Derived saving throw modifiers. Proficiency lives in CORE.

skills.description: Derived skill modifiers. Proficiency + expertise + ability live in CORE.

modifier.description: Derived: ability_modifier + proficiency (x1 or x2 for expertise) + any bonuses.

passive_scores.description: Derived passive scores. Keyed by skill identifier -> value (10 + skill_modifier + situational bonuses). At minimum includes perception.

effective_senses.description: Current special senses including temporary grants (spells, active effects). Merges CORE.permanent_senses with active-effect grants. Key = sense catalog ID -> range in feet.

effective_defenses.description: Current defences including temporary grants. Merges CORE.permanent_defenses with active-effect grants (e.g. Protection from Energy -> resistance).

effective_size.description: Current size catalog identifier. May differ from CORE.identity.size due to size-changing effects, shape-change features, or transformation states.

effective_abilities.description: Current effective ability scores after set-item effects. Key = ability catalog ID -> score. The deriver computes: max(CORE.final - reduction, set_effect_value).

source.description: Catalog identifier for the AC formula in use (worn armour, unarmoured-defence feature, spell).

base.description: Flat base before Dexterity contribution and bonuses.

dex_bonus.description: Dexterity contribution actually applied (after any armour cap).

floor.description: AC floor (e.g. AC-floor effect: AC becomes X if lower). null = no floor.

initiative.description: Initiative modifier added to the d20 (Dex modifier + bonuses).

speed.description: Effective current movement speeds. Key = mode catalog ID -> feet. Includes conditional bonuses (spell-granted speed modifiers, class-feature speed bonuses).

base_source.description: What grants the base walking speed.

base_mode.description: The speed-map mode identifier that base applies to.

character_states.description: Unified state tracker. Replaces the old top-level conditions, exhaustion, heroic_inspiration, active_concentration, and active_effects. NON-OVERWRITABLE — the deriver never assigns or modifies states. Empty array [] for a fresh unmodified character.

item_states.description: Live-play state for each INVENTORY item. Linked by inventory_ref. Tracks grip, attunement, charges, consumable state, and evaluated conditional grants.

features.description: ALL CORE features always appear here, matched by name. Those without limited uses carry max: null, remaining: null.

feats.description: ALL CORE feats always appear here, matched by name. Those without limited uses carry max: null, remaining: null.

prepared_spells.description: For spellbook casters: which GRIMOIRE spells with bucket='known' are currently prepared. Each entry is a (name, source) composite key. Absent/empty for non-spellbook casters. NON-OVERWRITABLE — deriver never fills, only validates.

characterState.description: One active state affecting the character. Every state is a catalog ID. source_type discriminates by origin.

state.description: State catalog ID. References a state from the catalog: conditions (blinded, charmed, etc.), class-feature states, spell-effect states, action states (Dodge, Hide, Ready), or item-powered states. The set of valid state identifiers is catalog-defined, not enumerated here.

source.description: What caused this state: a spell name, feature name, item name, or 'environment'.

source_type.description: The type of source that produced this state.

duration.description: Remaining duration. E.g. '1 minute', '10 minutes', 'until long rest', 'concentration', 'permanent'. Null if indefinite.

level.description: For leveled states (exhaustion level 3). Null for binary states.

detail.description: State-specific context. E.g. concentrating: {on: spell_id}, hidden: {stealth_check: 23}. For a self-transform state (the character temporarily BECOMES a creature): {into: creature_id, transform: 'physical'|'full'}. 'into' is a concrete creature catalog id whose stat block replaces the character's effective stats for the duration; templated (owner-scaled) creatures are not valid forms. 'transform' selects the replacement profile: 'physical' replaces the physical ability scores (Strength/Dexterity/Constitution), AC, speed, senses, attacks and size from the form while the character retains their mental ability scores (Intelligence/Wisdom/Charisma) and their own proficiencies/proficiency bonus; 'full' replaces all six ability scores (physical and mental) with the form's and drops the character's proficiencies. Both retain the character's own Hit Points/Hit Dice. 'transform' is optional and backward-compatible: when absent, 'into' contributes size only.

into.description: Concrete creature catalog id the character transforms into.

transform.description: Replacement profile. 'physical' = physical-form transform (retain mental abilities + own proficiencies); 'full' = full transform (replace all abilities, drop proficiencies).

itemState.description: Live-play state for one INVENTORY item. References the item by its sheet-local id. NON-OVERWRITABLE fields: attuned, consumed, charges.remaining, cumulative_seconds_used.

inventory_ref.description: References an INVENTORY item by its unique id.

grip.description: For weapons: '1h' or '2h'. Derivable from slot assignments + weapon properties. Null for non-weapons.

attuned.description: Whether the item is currently attuned. NON-OVERWRITABLE.

max.description: Max charges. Derivable from INVENTORY + DB.

consumed.description: Whether the item has been consumed (potion drunk, scroll used). NON-OVERWRITABLE.

cumulative_seconds_used.description: Cumulative seconds this item has been active. For items with per-day time limits (e.g., speed-enhancing footwear: 600s/day). NON-OVERWRITABLE.

evaluated_grants.description: Evaluated conditional grants for this item. Recalculated by the deriver from CORE grant_* rows x MODIFIER gates. Output of gate evaluation — not protected.

grant_ref.description: References a grant_* row in the DB.

active.description: Whether all gates for this grant are met.

type.description: The kind of gate being checked.

featureModifier.description: MODIFIER entry for a CORE feature. Always present, matched by name. Uses is derivable (max + recharge from DB) with remaining NON-OVERWRITABLE.

max.description: Max uses. null = unlimited (no expendable pool). Derivable from DB.

remaining.description: Remaining uses. NON-OVERWRITABLE. null when max is null (unlimited).

recharge_amount.description: How much is regained on recharge. Derivable from DB.

featModifier.description: MODIFIER entry for a CORE feat. Always present, matched by name. Uses is derivable (max + recharge from DB) with remaining NON-OVERWRITABLE.

max.description: Max uses. null = unlimited (no expendable pool). Derivable from DB.

remaining.description: Remaining uses. NON-OVERWRITABLE. null when max is null (unlimited).

recharge_amount.description: How much is regained on recharge. Derivable from DB.
